name: M-Pesa Payment Gateway
description: Accept M-Pesa payments via STK Push (Lipa Na M-Pesa Online). Integrates with Safaricom's Daraja API for seamless mobile money payments in Kenya.
author: Saleor Commerce

configuration.name: MPESA_CONSUMER_KEY
configuration.help_text: M-Pesa API Consumer Key from Daraja Portal
configuration.label: Consumer Key

configuration.name: MPESA_CONSUMER_SECRET
configuration.help_text: M-Pesa API Consumer Secret from Daraja Portal
configuration.label: Consumer Secret

configuration.name: MPESA_SHORTCODE
configuration.help_text: M-Pesa Business Shortcode (Paybill or Till Number)
configuration.label: Business Shortcode

configuration.name: MPESA_PASSKEY
configuration.help_text: Lipa Na M-Pesa Online Passkey from Daraja Portal
configuration.label: Passkey

configuration.name: MPESA_ENVIRONMENT
configuration.help_text: API Environment: 'sandbox' for testing or 'production' for live transactions
configuration.label: Environment

configuration.name: MPESA_CALLBACK_URL
configuration.help_text: Public URL for M-Pesa to send payment confirmations (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/api/plugins/mpesa/callback/)
configuration.label: Callback URL
